credits.title: AR Credits
credits.subtitle: Manage unapplied customer credits and reuse them against open receivables.
credits.infoBody: These balances come from unapplied AR ledger credits created by overpayments and reversals.
credits.emptyDescription: No unapplied credits are available for allocation right now.

reverse.title: Reverse Credit Application
reverse.error: Failed to reverse the credit application.

fields.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this credit application being reversed?

disputes.title: AR Disputes
disputes.subtitle: Track disputed invoices, resolution outcomes, and receivable holds with full audit history.
disputes.infoTitle: Disputes suspend the standard AR lifecycle
disputes.infoBody: Opening a dispute moves the invoice into DISPUTED status until the case is resolved or cancelled.
disputes.emptyDescription: No AR disputes matched the selected scope.

errors.submit: The dispute action could not be completed.

dunning.title: AR Dunning
dunning.subtitle: Run reminder, escalation, and credit hold actions against overdue receivables.
dunning.infoBody: Every reminder or hold action is logged here so collection activity stays auditable by customer and invoice.
dunning.emptyDescription: No dunning actions have been logged for this tenant scope yet.

run.title: Run Dunning Action
run.error: Failed to execute the dunning action.

cycles.title: Statement Cycles
cycles.subtitle: Define consolidated statement billing cycles for B2B receivable operations.
cycles.infoBody: Cycle definitions determine which customers are grouped for statement-style invoice generation and when those runs occur.
cycles.emptyDescription: Create a statement cycle to prepare consolidated B2B billing runs.

create.title: Create Statement Cycle
create.error: Failed to create the statement cycle.

fields.customerIdsPlaceholder: Comma-separated or line-separated customer UUIDs for custom-list cycles

preview.title: Preview Cycle
preview.error: Failed to preview the statement cycle.
preview.resultCount: {count, plural, one {# customer matched this cycle.} other {# customers matched this cycle.}}
